Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Premium software engineering and cloud automation engineered for hyper-growth.
Services.webDevDesc: Premium, pixel-perfect, and highly optimized corporate websites utilizing the latest frameworks.
Services.webAppsDesc: Custom, scalable SaaS applications and dashboards designed for optimal workflow performance.
Services.uiuxDesc: Modern, Stripe-like user interfaces designed with strict layout hierarchies and seamless micro-interactions.
Services.brandingDesc: Logos, brand guidelines, and visuals designed to position your business as a category leader.
Services.aiSolutionsDesc: Integration of Large Language Models, custom agents, and predictive analytics into your pipelines.
Services.cloudDesc: Sleek, highly available AWS and Cloudflare R2 infrastructure designed for near-zero downtime.
Services.automationDesc: Automate internal databases, billing pipelines, CRM syncs, and client support flows.

Home.heroSubheadline: Astraiv Technologies is an enterprise-grade IT firm and SaaS engine. We craft premium websites, high-performance web applications, custom AI automations, and modern cloud infrastructure.
Home.trustedBy: Trusted by industry leaders and high-growth engineering teams
Home.platformSubtitle: Manage your projects, submit support tickets, track billing, and automate CRM leads from a premium dashboard.
Home.teamSubtitle: Meet the senior software engineers and designers building the future.
Home.testimonialsSubtitle: Hear from directors, founders, and engineering leaders working with Astraiv.
Home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about our services and delivery models.
Home.faq1Q: What technology stack do you use?
Home.faq1A: We build primarily with Next.js (App Router), React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, PostgreSQL, and Cloudflare R2, guaranteeing near-instant page loads and serverless scalability.
Home.faq2Q: How do you handle project management?
Home.faq2A: All clients receive access to our custom Client Portal, where you can check real-time project boards, review documentation, track billing, and open direct support tickets.
Home.faq3A: Yes, we offer monthly SLA agreements covering active monitoring, security patches, package upgrades, database backups, and direct priority Slack support.
Home.pricingSubtitle: Choose a plan that matches your engineering velocity.
Home.ctaSubtitle: Join forces with our elite engineering team to build, scale, and automate your technology stack today.
